LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisCompleteDesc: The recovered fragment has been decoded. {0} and {1} can now be researched in the Abyssal Protocol tab.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisAlreadyKnown: Herald fragment analysis is already complete.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisFailedMissingProject: Herald fragment analysis could not be resolved because the target research project is missing.
